raw_consumer_statement:
There was a charge made on my card on XXXX on my card at XXXX XXXX  for {$1000.00}. I did not use that card at the time and was not checking it. I disputed the charge in XXXX when I saw it I called and opened a claim telling them it was not me. 
They supposedly did an investigation and said the charge was me and put the amount back on my card. I called and disputed it again. Told them to send me a signature proof or images of me making the purchase since I was physically not possible for me to be at this location to make the purchase and it was not mine. 
They said they would look into and and I just received my statement and they put the amount back. 
Its not me. What can I do
